title: ParserOutput
description: Structured output produced by the ingestion team's document parser. One JSON document per source file. The eval harness consumes this format; the ingestion team's parser must conform to it. Bump $version on any breaking change.

schema_version.description: Semver of this schema. Eval harness will refuse outputs with an incompatible major version.

parser_version.description: Semver of the parser that produced this output. Required so regression reports can attribute changes to a specific parser release.

parsed_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when this output was generated.

doc_id.description: Stable identifier for the source document. Eval harness joins on this field.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the raw source bytes. Used to detect when re-parsing is needed.

pages.description: Per-page metadata. Index in array = page_index used by elements.

width.description: Page width in points (PDF) or pixels (image).

elements.description: Ordered list of structural elements extracted from the document. Order MUST reflect intended reading order; eval will score reading-order fidelity against this.

warnings.description: Non-fatal parser warnings (e.g. low-confidence OCR regions). Optional but encouraged.

element_id.description: Optional reference to the element this warning concerns.

Element.description: A single structural element. The 'type' field discriminates the subtype-specific fields under 'content'.

element_id.description: Stable, unique-within-document identifier. The eval harness uses this as the citation anchor.

parent_id.description: element_id of the parent (e.g. list_item's parent list, caption's parent figure). Null for top-level.

page_index.description: Index into pages[]. For elements spanning multiple pages, this is the starting page; use pages_spanned for the full range.

pages_spanned.description: Optional. All page indices this element occupies, for tables/figures crossing page breaks.

bbox.description: Bounding box on page_index, in the same coordinate system as pages[].width/height. Optional but required for layout scoring.

char_span.description: [start, end) character offsets of this element's text within the document's full concatenated text. Critical for citation evaluation — the eval harness uses character spans as the canonical evidence locator.

text.description: Plain-text content of this element. For tables, this is a readable rendering (e.g. markdown). For figures, this is the caption or alt text.

content.description: Type-specific structured content. Schema varies by element type — see $defs below.

confidence.description: Parser's confidence in this element (e.g. OCR confidence). Optional.

TextContent.description: For heading, paragraph, caption, footnote, header, footer, page_number, code_block, equation.

TableContent.description: For tables. Cells are addressed by zero-indexed (row, col). Spanning cells use row_span/col_span.

image_uri.description: Optional. URI or relative path to extracted image asset.

caption_element_id.description: If a separate caption element exists, its element_id.

ListContent.description: For list containers. Individual items are separate elements of type 'list_item' with parent_id pointing to this list's element_id.
